channel.title: Kiwi's Blog Feed
channel.description: I wonder how many people would follow my blogs using this feed...

item.title: Tomodachi Life on 吊你老母 (Part 2)
item.description:
Slowburn? More like Speed inferno!

Welcome to part 2 of my Tomodachi Life gameplay! Within just three days, a lot has happened on 吊你老母 (Oh yeah that's my island name BTW).

...Continue reading

item.title: Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream (Part 1)
item.description:
I'm losing sleep

On April 15, in every country, when 12 am strikes, Tomodachi Life is released. I sat down waiting for the moment, and when the timer reaches zero, I immediately opened the long-await game...

...Continue reading

item.title: The Amazing Digital Region Limited Movie
item.description:
Glitch Studio pls

So this morning I woke up, I saw the trailer for EP9, A.K.A. the final episode of The Amazing Digital Circus, was out. I watched the trailer and was quite excited (Jax, I like your writing but I can't wait for you to die), but unfortunately... There's some bad news if you are not American, Latin American, Japanese or Canadian.

...Continue reading

item.title: Wow Leeks!!111!
item.description:
The days when I would dig for one day early info

Being in various fandoms, I was an excitable fan who would go through every corners of the Internet just to get a small info on the newest updates. Even if said info is something meant to be officially released the very next day, it still brought me so much thrill.

...Continue reading

item.title: Werewolf game, and Gnosia
item.description:
Amogus

My sister recommended me the anime Gnosia, it's a werewolf game style visual novel adapted into an anime. While I enjoy stories with the character's life at stake, the story isn't about winning the game; It's about learning about the characters and lore.

...Continue reading

item.title: Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream Demo
item.description:
Tomodachi more like Wokedachi

So last September, the Ninendo Direct teased Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream. As someone who enjoys the Sims, Miitopia and the older version of Tomodachi Life, and someone who loves inserting my OCs into stuff, I was so excited for it's release. Not only that, they have added lots of improvements, such as gay marriage, island decoration, non-binary gender option, face painting??? Damn they went max on the woke factor, I love it lmao.

...Continue reading

item.title: TADC: EP 8
item.description:
Holy shit

Yesterday, the long await episode 8 of TADC came out. Man so many things had happened to fandoms the past week, especially to the Cookie Run fandom. Last time from episode 7, the circus members got baited by the possibility of an exit, but got hit by the reveal that there's no exit. So now, what would they do?

...Continue reading

item.title: Cookie Run Kingdom EP15
item.description:
Shadow Milked Cookie

So today, the new chapter for Cookie Run Kingdom came out. Knowing how much Devsis loves Shadow Milk, I guess he would be milked like always. However, one thing I was excited for is Timekeeper, who Devsis hinted to appear in the next arc. After I finished the test at school, I checked out the fandom's reaction... Oh god.

...Continue reading

item.title: Ear Piercings |TW|
item.description:
Hehe shiny rocks

Around last week, I was having a hard time sleeping due to my air-con making too much noise. In the next morning, I woke up with a somewhat fuzzy head, and suddenly gained a thought: I should get earrings!

...Continue reading

item.title: Homestuck
item.description:
You can’t fight it

Ah yes, the dreaded Homestuck. It isn’t very popular in Hong Kong, but it’s everywhere in western countries from the stories I’ve heard. My initial impressions of this series is just I found it funny when people cower in fear when the word Homestuck is mentioned. But sometime in the COVID19-era, I decided to give this webcomic a try.

...Continue reading
